### Insight Text
Kenya's natural and semi-natural grassland extent decreased from 28.46 million hectares in 2000 to 25.12 million hectares in 2022. This represents a decline of approximately 11.71%, with no periods of restoration observed in the data. Note that these estimates are based on pixel counting and may include misclassifications with croplands or urban mosaics.
